subject: Welcome to Modern Tribes
content_html: Welcome to Modern Tribes! We are excited to have you join our community platform.

subject: Summer BBQ: Registration Open
content_html: The Summer BBQ registration is now open. Please confirm your attendance before the end of the month.

subject: Monthly Activity Reminder
content_html: This is your friendly monthly reminder to check on your tribe projects and keep your profile up to date.

subject: Book Club: New Title Selected
content_html: The book club has chosen a new title for this month. Check the reading schedule document for details and session dates.

subject: Camping Trip: Final Reminder
content_html: The annual camping trip is just around the corner! Please review the packing list and safety procedures before departure.

subject: Marathon Training Kick-off
content_html: The charity marathon 12-week training plan starts next Monday. Join us in training for a great cause!

subject: Community Garden: Spring Season
content_html: The community garden spring season is starting. Come by to pick up your plot assignment and review the planting calendar.
